impact: This advances the PP&D DevHub guardrail plan by proving consequential and financial workflow actions are classified correctly and remain blocked unless the user supplies the exact explicit confirmation text for that action.
summary: Add fixture-only DevHub action-classifier authorization helpers and unit tests for inspection scheduling, correction upload, cancellation, certification, and payment gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-40: Add DevHub action-classifier tests for inspection scheduling, correction upload, cancellation, certification, and payment actions, ensuring consequential and financial actions require exact explicit user confirmation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
